name: Magic Circle

components.material: salt and powdered silver worth 100+ GP, which the spell consumes

description: A 10-foot-radius, 20-foot-tall Cylinder of magical energy wards against a chosen creature type (Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead): such creatures can't willingly enter by nonmagical means, have Disadvantage on attacks against those inside, and can't charm/frighten/possess them — or you can invert it to trap a creature inside. Engine: a creature-type ward is descriptive only until creature-type tagging + this consumer land.
